Overview

What to Expect From Hardwood Driveway Gates in Highgate

Hardwood Driveway Gates are one of the most commonly requested gate types among Highgate homeowners. Our vetted installers understand the specific challenges that Highgate properties present — from tight access to sloped driveways, period property restrictions, and London clay ground conditions.

Highgate homeowners also benefit from working with installers who know the local planning rules. Most driveway gates fall under permitted development, but some London boroughs have additional guidelines. Our Highgate installers handle these routinely and will flag any issues during the survey.

Process

How Hardwood Driveway Gates Installation Works in Highgate

01

Book a free site survey at a vetted Highgate installer through our matching form

02

Your installer visits, measures up, discusses design and material options, and checks ground conditions

03

You receive a detailed written quote with a clear cost breakdown and timeline

04

Once approved, the gate is designed, fabricated, and delivered to site

05

Installation takes 2 to 4 days: groundwork, gate fitting, automation, and finishing

06

Full commissioning, safety testing, and handover with remotes and manual release training

Pricing Guide 2026

How Much Do Hardwood Driveway Gates Cost in Highgate?

Driveway gate prices in Highgate vary depending on the gate type, material, and level of automation. Below are typical costs from vetted installers in the Highgate area. All prices are in GBP and include full installation.

Gate TypePrice RangeInstall TimeIncludes
Electric Swing Gates (Fully Installed)£3,500 – £10,0002 to 4 daysGate + motor + posts + remotes
Electric Swing Gates (Fully Installed)£3,500 – £10,000
2 to 4 days
0% Finance Available
From £99/month
Over 6 to 36 months at 0% APR
Subject to status
Every Quote Includes
  • ✓Free site survey and measurement
  • ✓Bespoke gate design and fabrication
  • ✓All groundwork, posts, and foundations
  • ✓Automation motor, remotes, and safety sensors
  • ✓Intercom or keypad wiring (where specified)
  • ✓Full commissioning, testing, and handover
Spread the Cost at 0%

Many of our London installers offer 0% finance on gate installations, letting you spread the cost from as little as £99 per month. Subject to status and approval.

From £99/month
Over 6 to 36 months at 0% APR

The cost of driveway gates in Highgate depends on several factors: the material, whether you want automation, the width of your entrance, and any bespoke design requirements. London prices tend to sit at the higher end nationally, but the installers in our Highgate network are competitively priced. Every installer offers a free site survey so you can get an accurate, itemised quote before any commitment.

Why Us

Why Get Hardwood Driveway Gates in Highgate Through Us?

Every Highgate installer has been independently verified for experience, insurance, and warranty standards
You get a free site survey with a detailed written quote before any commitment
Highgate installers offer flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends
Aftercare, warranties, and ongoing maintenance support are included as standard

Hardwood Driveway Gates in Highgate: Common Questions

Iroko is the most popular choice for London. It is naturally oily, resists moisture without heavy treatment, and does not warp easily in the damp-dry cycles of a London year. European oak is the premium alternative — it weathers to a beautiful silver-grey if left untreated, or can be oiled to maintain its golden colour. Accoya, a modified radiata pine with a 50-year above-ground guarantee, is the best choice for those who want maximum lifespan with the lowest maintenance burden.
